programmes.show_description: A 17-year-old leads her rap crew to a rival's hideout under the guise of a hookup text. When Homicide gets involved, the level of her involvement comes into question.
A renowned activist believes a hate group has kidnapped her sister; Garland and Benson seek change with NYPD brass; Kat receives some good news.
Benson encounters a hostage situation at a neighbourhood restaurant; Rollins attempts to help her father who has been hospitalised.
Detectives probe the death of a man who washed ashore after falling off a cruise ship. But was it suicide or murder?
When Logan and Barek investigate a series of home invasions that result in grisly murders, their search leads them to a local foster mother.
A generous boyfriend steps in to prevent his girlfriend from going to jail. Officers save a kitten who wants to hide in a dangerous place.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Jessica returns to Ireland and finds herself fighting to stop a mining conglomerate from destroying a beautiful valley.
Murder mystery series. The therapist of a top young tennis player with a tragic past is killed during a charity tournament.
Jessica travels to New Orleans and is caught up in a web of voodoo related murders.
Erin helps a former witness shut down a drug operation in his apartment building.
Danny and Baez team up with two Russian operatives to search for a dangerous Russian man who entered the U.S. on a diplomatic visa.
A Mexican drug cartel targets Danny when he intercepts a shipment of several million dollars; Jaime goes after a serial killer who preys on the elderly.
Danny contemplates retiring until Erin enlists him to help her with a case involving her ex-husband. Jamie and Eddie go undercover as a couple. Frank butts heads with the new mayor.
Frank battles with the mayor about a community parade that is honouring a once-convicted cop bomber. Jamie and Eddy stumble upon a misleading congressman.
Logan and Wheeler investigate the murder of a prominent judge's son. As the case unravels, it seems a convict with a grudge is responsible.
Detectives probe the murder of a surgeon who provided deaf patients with cochlear implants. Is a radical deaf playwright responsible for the crime?
Goren and Eames investigate the murder of an astronaut visiting New York City.
A police recruit is found murdered and the trail leads to the victim's girlfriend - a fugitive and identity thief.
Goren and Eames investigate after a fellow officer's teenage step-daughter is found dead in her car after a night of partying.
Carisi tries Richard Wheatley for the murder of Kathy Stabler. Benson finds herself at odds with a friend when Barba agrees to take the case.
The squad is called in to investigate a wave of hate crimes on Christmas Eve. Amanda catches up with an old flame.
While the squad seeks three women, who allegedly drug and rob wealthy men, the case leads to personal con-nections for both Benson and Kat.
Rollins returns to an old case when a child, who is sent to a juvenile detention centre, is released following his 18th birthday.
A troubled young man confesses to the murder of his parents, but Barek and Logan can't shake the feeling that he is innocent.
Goren and Eames investigate when a fire at a church leads to a death. An email insinuates that Deakins got Martinez to lie about the Logan shooting.
A young couple spends too much time arguing and not enough time paying attention to the road. An officer uses his surefire trick to catch someone in a lie.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Power Down: US drama following the work of the navy's dedicated federal agency. An armed assault on an internet service provider leaves a female navy officer dead.
Crime drama series. The team investigates the macabre murder of a marine who was guarding a gifted young girl with access to high level military secrets.
US drama. The team investigates the cold-blooded murder of a devoutly religious marine in what appears to be a hate crime.
An investigation into the murder of a rock singer is hampered by the unorthodox tactics of a cop-turned-writer.
McCoy and Southerlyn try to circumvent the law to access some crucial evidence.
When a skeleton is found, the team discover that the victim was thought to have died during the September 11 attack on the World Trade Center.
When a woman turns up dead and her boyfriend goes missing, Briscoe and Green turn their attention to the last person to see the pair alive.
The prime suspect in a murder investigation claims his knowledge of the death came from a psychic vision.
When the admissions officer at a top school is found dead, Briscoe and Green launch an investigation.
Patriot Down: Crime drama series. When a colleague's murder sends shockwaves through the team, Gibbs uncovers a surprising link to the crime.
Rule Fifty-One: Crime drama series following the US navy's dedicated federal agency. Gibbs heads to Mexico to face his demons and makes a startling decision.
The Spider and The Fly: US crime drama series. The NCIS team become targets of female mobster Paloma Reynosa, who is trying to fulfil her vendetta against Gibbs.
NCIS has to find out the truth behind a tell-all book that threatens a decorated Marine's life before it is published.
A boy disappears after meeting up with an online gamer. Benson suspects her son is being bullied.
